name: Maritime Vessel OT Compromise
description: Attack tree modelling compromise of a ship's operational technology systems including ECDIS navigation, GPS, engine controls, and ballast management
root_objective: Compromise vessel OT systems to endanger navigation, propulsion, or stability

nodes.title: Compromise Maritime Vessel OT
nodes.description: Take control of a vessel's operational technology to endanger navigation, propulsion, or structural stability

nodes.title: Compromise Navigation Systems
nodes.description: Attack ECDIS, GPS, AIS, or radar to cause navigational errors

nodes.title: GPS Spoofing via SDR
nodes.description: Broadcast false GPS signals with a software-defined radio to alter the vessel's perceived position

nodes.title: Exploit ECDIS Vulnerabilities
nodes.description: Compromise the Electronic Chart Display running outdated Windows to alter displayed charts and routes

nodes.title: Inject False AIS Data
nodes.description: Transmit spoofed AIS messages to create phantom vessels or mask the ship's true position

nodes.title: Compromise Engine Control Systems
nodes.description: Attack the engine room automation or propulsion control systems

nodes.title: Pivot via Ship-to-Shore VSAT Link
nodes.description: Exploit the always-on satellite broadband connection to reach the onboard network

nodes.title: Manipulate Engine Governor Setpoints
nodes.description: Alter propulsion system PLCs to cause engine overspeed, overheating, or emergency shutdown

nodes.title: Tamper with Ballast Water System
nodes.description: Manipulate ballast tank filling/emptying to destabilise the vessel

nodes.title: Override Ballast Valve Controllers
nodes.description: Command ballast pump and valve PLCs to asymmetrically fill or empty tanks, creating dangerous list

nodes.title: USB Infection During Port Call
nodes.description: Introduce malware via USB during chart updates or maintenance while vessel is in port

nodes.title: Flat Network Between Bridge and Engine Room
nodes.description: Most vessels lack network segmentation between navigation bridge, engine room, and crew welfare systems
